levels.authority: Defines project purpose, constraints, acceptance posture, and final research or product judgment.
responsibilities: decide unresolved product or research tradeoffs

levels.authority: Translates developer intent into roadmap phases, issue structure, workflow graphs, and supervisor job tickets.
Runs the assigned workflow within ticket boundaries and escalates when the graph cannot be completed safely.
responsibilities: run local validation and repair loops
nondelegable_actions: edit tracked files unless explicitly authorized

levels.authority: Executes one bounded node with assigned context and tools.

workspace.wrong_root_stop_rule: If the active workspace root does not resolve to the assigned project, write a blocked report and stop.

job.title: Bounded supervisor workflow
job.goal: Run one assigned workflow graph and return compact evidence for coordinator review.

stop_conditions: active root is not the assigned workspace
success_criteria: final signal is one of the allowed job signals
verification evidence is compact and inspectable

verification.scoring: Use the task-specific scoring rubric named by the coordinator ticket.

public_safety.raw_transcript_policy: raw transcripts stay under ignored runtime or tmp paths
